chunks.title: Mordecai's Mourning and Esther's Reaction
chunks.reason: Describes Mordecai's public mourning and Esther's initial response to his distress.

chunks.title: Esther Inquires and Responds
chunks.reason: Contains the exchange between Esther and Mordecai regarding the decree and her hesitation.

chunks.title: Mordecai's Challenge to Esther
chunks.reason: Mordecai delivers a specific argument urging Esther to act for her people.

chunks.title: Esther's Decision and Action
chunks.reason: Esther issues a command to fast and declares her willingness to face the king.
